meta.title: OpenClaw fails to persist openai-codex auth after browser authorization
meta.summary: After browser authorization succeeds, OpenClaw may still fail to exchange the final token and write openai-codex auth credentials.
summary: After browser authorization succeeds, OpenClaw may still fail to exchange the final token and write openai-codex auth credentials.
suggestion.check_proxy: Check the configured HTTP proxy and retry the login flow.
